tasks.instruction:
Fix scrolling issues and improve layouts across all screens in the Invoice Accounting System. The current layout has scrolling problems on all pages. Need to:
1. Fix scrolling functionality on all screens (Dashboard, Invoices, Payments, Allocation, Reports, Buyers, Brokers, Users)
2. Improve overall layout design and user experience
3. Ensure proper responsive design
4. Fix table overflow and scrolling within containers
5. Optimize spacing, padding, and visual hierarchy
6. Ensure all content is accessible and scrollable when needed
Technology stack: Shadcn-ui, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

Fix scrolling and layout issues specifically on Invoice Entry and Payment Entry screens. The user reports these screens still cannot be scrolled and have poor layout. Focus on:
1. Fix scrolling functionality on Invoice creation/editing forms and dialogs
2. Fix scrolling functionality on Payment creation/editing forms and dialogs
3. Improve layout of invoice entry forms (create/edit dialogs)
4. Improve layout of payment entry forms (create/edit dialogs)
5. Ensure form fields are properly accessible and scrollable
6. Fix table scrolling within the Invoices and Payments pages
7. Optimize form spacing, field arrangement, and visual hierarchy
8. Ensure responsive design works on mobile devices
Key files: src/pages/Invoices.tsx, src/pages/Payments.tsx
Technology stack: Shadcn-ui, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

Comprehensively fix scrolling issues across ALL screens in the Invoice Accounting System. The user reports scrolling is still not working on any screen. This requires a complete overhaul of the scrolling implementation:
1. Fix main layout scrolling structure in Layout.tsx
2. Fix scrolling on ALL pages: Dashboard, Invoices, Payments, Allocation, Reports, Buyers, Brokers, Users
3. Fix scrolling in ALL dialogs and forms (create/edit for invoices, payments, etc.)
4. Fix table scrolling with proper overflow containers
5. Ensure proper CSS classes for scrolling (overflow-auto, overflow-y-auto)
6. Test scrolling functionality on both desktop and mobile
7. Improve overall layout design and spacing
8. Ensure responsive design works properly
Focus on making EVERY screen scrollable when content exceeds viewport height.
Technology stack: Shadcn-ui, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
